name: OpenAI API
description: Access GPT-4, DALL-E 3, Whisper, TTS, and embeddings — the most widely used AI API platform.
longDescription: The OpenAI API provides access to state-of-the-art AI models for natural language processing, image generation, speech recognition, text-to-speech, and vector embeddings. Key models include GPT-4o for multimodal chat, DALL-E 3 for image generation, Whisper for speech-to-text, and text-embedding-3-large for semantic search. The API supports streaming, function calling, JSON mode, and vision capabilities.
pricing: Free $5 credit for new users; pay-as-you-go thereafter (GPT-3.5-turbo: $0.002/1K tokens)
affiliateText: Wrap OpenAI in a serverless backend — deploy on Vercel Edge Functions for minimal latency.
